name: HTS_SCHED_KPIS
description: This table is dedicated to the KPI that were calculated during a schedule validation execution.

columns.Name: SCHED_KPI_ID
columns.Comments: The ID of the schedule KPI.

columns.Name: SCHED_FULL_VALIDATION_ID
columns.Comments: The ID of the schedule validation execution having generated this KPI.

columns.Name: KPI_NAME_LOOKUP_TYPE
columns.Comments: The reference to the lookup denoting the KPI name enumeration.

columns.Name: KPI_NAME_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.Comments: The reference to the lookup denoting the KPI name enumeration value.

columns.Name: VALUE_UNIT_CODE
columns.Comments: The unit of the KPI value.

columns.Name: SCOPE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: The scope start date for kpis having a temporal scope.

columns.Name: SCOPE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: The scope end date for kpis having a temporal scope.

columns.Name: PARENT_KPI_ID
columns.Comments: The ID of the parent KPI.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
